public_reputation: Shipside infiltrator who can cross a flotilla without ringing a mast bell.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Cosmouth, that reads as someone maritime, urbane, and commercially fluid, balancing archive-minded memory with port pragmatism, and the habits of a rogue still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of rogue in and around Cosmoria, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Cosmoria workable through the obligations of rogue while managing the immediate pressure of storm weather in Cosmouth.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Cosmoria, that usually means carrying storm weather, trade vulnerability, archive and tax discipline without letting the role of rogue visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Niv Brinegrin needs help with a problem in Cosmoria that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Niv Brinegrin can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Niv Brinegrin can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained.
public_signal: Niv Brinegrin carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Cosmoria, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Cosmouth.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Cosmoria: the part of Cosmoria where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
